---
title: \center Hello! Welcome to my world \center
output: 
html_document:
    css: "_site/site_libs/bootstrap-3.3.5/css/readable.min.css"
    includes:
      before_body: "_site/site_libs/bootstrap-3.3.5/js/bootstrap.min.js"
    self_contained: false
---
<img 
    style="display: block; 
           margin-left: auto;
           margin-right: auto;
           width: 20%;"
    src="preview.png"  
    alt="Our logo">
</img>
<h1 style="text-align: center;">Bio</h1>
